mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule ( user_id, name, start_time, end_time, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{remark}, #{deleted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, start_time, end_time, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time ASC

SELECT * FROM schedule WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET name = #{name}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE schedule SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
